channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Python (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Python nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐍 microsoft/SkillOpt (5090 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: microsoft

📝 Repository: microsoft/SkillOpt

📄 Descrizione: SkillOpt is a text-space optimizer that trains reusable natural-language skills for frozen LLM agents through trajectory-driven edits, validation-gated updates, and deployable best_skill.md artifacts.

⭐ Stelle: 5090

🍴 Forks: 505

💻 Linguaggio: Python

🏷️ Topics: agent-skills self-evolving-agents

📜 Licenza: MIT License

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐍 XBuilderLAB/cheat-on-content (3240 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: XBuilderLAB

📝 Repository: XBuilderLAB/cheat-on-content

📄 Descrizione: You're reading this. The skill predicted it. A workflow that turns every post into a calibrated experiment—score, blind-predict, retro, evolve. The future doesn't reward effort, it rewards those who see the pattern first. 1M followers in a month — not luck, system.

⭐ Stelle: 3240

🍴 Forks: 557

💻 Linguaggio: Python

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-05T10:28:33Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-03T06:43:33Z

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: omnigent-ai

📝 Repository: omnigent-ai/omnigent

📄 Descrizione: A meta-harness for all your AI agents. Omnigent provides a common layer over Claude Code, Codex, Pi, and the agents you write yourself: swap or combine harnesses without rewriting, keep them in check with policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time on the same live session, from any device.

item.description:
👤 Owner: xzf-thu

📝 Repository: xzf-thu/Mega-ASR

📄 Descrizione: First foundation ASR built for the real world - 7 atomic acoustic conditions, 54 compound scenarios, 2.6M samples, and up to ~30% gains over SOTA where every other model falls apart. **You'll come back to MEGA-ASR, after the rest fail in the wild. ⭐**

⭐ Stelle: 985

🍴 Forks: 63

💻 Linguaggio: Python

🏷️ Topics: asr robust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-16T12:28:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-14T05:42:39Z

]]>

📄 Descrizione: ⚠️ Experimentelle Skill-Sammlung für deutsches Recht (Arbeits-, Gesellschafts-, Insolvenz-, Datenschutz-, Prozessrecht u.a.) – inzwischen verbessert und im Alltag getestet, aber weiterhin Experiment. Bitte selber ausprobieren, Issues/PRs willkommen! Keine Rechtsberatung. Mandatsgeheimnis (§§ 203/204 StGB, § 43e BRAO), DSGVO, US-Transfer, KI-VO & Co

item.title: 🐍 next-1688/1688-customer-opportunity (856 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: next-1688

📝 Repository: next-1688/1688-customer-opportunity

📄 Descrizione: 1688 买家跟进与客群运营。可以帮你做： ① 查看AI客群列表 — 店铺有哪些高价值老客客群、各客群特征和买家数 ② 展开客群买家明细 — 选一个客群，看具体有哪些买家 ③ 开启客群运营计划 — 对选定客群自动发送旺旺营销文案 ④ 查买家成交机会 — 输入买家账号，获取画像和跟进建议 ⑤ 客户机会监控 — 智能找出近期最值得主动联系的买家

⭐ Stelle: 856

🍴 Forks: 15

💻 Linguaggio: Python

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-14T06:23:18Z
